title: NS&I main estimates memorandum 2024 to 2025 (July 2024)
body: "This Estimates Memorandum details NS&I’s main budgetary changes for the 2024 to 2025 financial year.  HM Treasury laid the 2024 to 2025 Main Estimates in Parliament on 17 July 2024. These estimates confirm each government department’s budgets for the financial year. "
